zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Staunton於1163年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾內瓦可時，他的父親Mauger Staunton32歲，母親Beatrix Belvoir30歲。他於1191年與Athelina Stratton Musters在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1195年住在英國諾廷加姆爾內瓦可。他去世於1216年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾內瓦爾可--特倫特享年53歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Staunton于1163年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾內瓦可时，他的父亲Mauger Staunton32岁，母亲Beatrix Belvoir30岁。他于1191年与Athelina Stratton Musters在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾史道頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1195年住在英国諾廷加姆爾內瓦可。他去世于1216年在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾內瓦爾可--特倫特享年53岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Staunton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Caitlin, Ciaran, Cormac.

English and Irish: variant of Stanton . This English name has been established (in this spelling) since medieval times in Ireland (Mayo, Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as de Stonndún. Compare McEvilly .

variants.name: McEvilly
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Mhílidh ‘son of the knight’, from Gaelic míleadh ‘warrior, knight’. In County Mayo and County Cork, a family of English origin Gaelicized their name from Staunton to Mac an Mhílidh, apparently because of the latter's presumed similarity to the name of their ancestor, Milo de Stanton.

variants.name: Stanton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England called Stanton or Staunton, especially Stanton in Staffordshire and Staunton in Worcestershire, all named with Old English stān ‘stone’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Most of the placenames come from their situation on stony ground, but in the case of Stanton Harcourt in Oxfordshire and Stanton Drew in Avon the reference is to the proximity of prehistoric stone monuments. The name has also sometimes been chosen by Ashkenazic Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames. This surname has also long been established in Ireland (especially Mayo).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Staunton was born in 1163, in Newark, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Mauger Staunton, was 32 and his mother, Beatrix Belvoir, was 30. He married Athelina Stratton Musters in 1191, in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He lived in Newark, Nottinghamshire, England in 1195. He died in 1216, in Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Staunton est né en 1163, à Newark, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Mauger Staunton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Belvoir, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Athelina Stratton Musters en 1191, à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il a vécu à Newark, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre en 1195. Il est décédé en 1216, à Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Staunton 1163 in Newark, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mauger Staunton 32 und seine Mutter Beatrix Belvoir 30. Er hat 1191 in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Athelina Stratton Musters geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. 1195 hat er in Newark, Nottinghamshire, England gelebt. Er starb 1216 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Athelina Stratton Musters nel 1191, nel Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Vissuto a Newark, Nottinghamshire, England nel 1195. ja.lifeSummary: William de Stauntonが1163年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアニューアルクで生まれた時，父Mauger Stauntonは32歳，母Beatrix Belvoirは30歳であった。1191年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンでAthelina Stratton Mustersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1195年にはイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアニューアルクに住んでいた。彼は1216年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアニューアルク-オン-トレントで53歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Staunton(이)가 1163년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 뉴아르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mauger Staunton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix Belvoir(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1191년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에서 Athelina Stratton Musters(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 1195년도에 영국 노틴그함실르 뉴아르크에서 살았다. 그는 1216년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 뉴아르k--트렌트에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에 묻혔다.

ro.Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, England: Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Staunton родился в 1163 г. в местности нюарк, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Mauger Staunton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Belvoir, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Athelina Stratton Musters в 1191 г. в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он жил в местности нюарк, ноттингхамшир, Англия в 1195 году. Он умер в 1216 г. в местности нюарк-он-трент, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

Se casó con Athelina Stratton Musters en 1191, en Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Vivió en Newark, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra en 1195. Murió en 1216, en Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
